name: Blueberry Raspberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the berries and sugar.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally so the fruit will start to release juices.
3. Bring the mixture to a rolling boil, then add the Certo and return to a rolling boil.
4. Boil for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Ladle into hot bottles and seal.
Makes 6 pints.
